name: claude-codex-loop
description: Claude/Codex collaboration loop runtime for structured coding, review, and turn-based workflows

scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target bun && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.build:plugin: mkdir -p plugins/claude-codex-loop/server && bun build src/bridge.ts --outfile plugins/claude-codex-loop/server/bridge-server.js --target bun && bun build src/daemon.ts --outfile plugins/claude-codex-loop/server/daemon.js --target bun
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build:cli && bun run build:plugin
scripts.validate:plugin: claude plugin validate plugins/claude-codex-loop && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && bun test src && bun run build:plugin && bun scripts/check-plugin-versions.js

author: Claude Codex Loop Contributors
